content: We can frame human persistent long-term memory as a fine-tuned, low-attention persistent residual buffer that complements the episodic memory already observed to emerge endogenously in Transformer attention heads. This arrangement mirrors how persistent system memory works in computing, allowing Transformers to separate transient episodic context retrieval from stable long-term persistent knowledge storage, just like human memory does.
source_topics: Transformer attention mechanism for episodic memory
